svg.title: Grouped bar chart: SW vs HW accelerator latency comparison
svg.desc: Log-scale grouped bar chart comparing ARM Cortex-A9 software baseline versus CIM hardware accelerator latency across three workloads: MLP, LeNet-5 Sequential SW, and LeNet-5 Batched BLAS SW. Speedup values of 43.0×, 34.8×, and 6.0× are annotated above each pair.
svg.text: Inference Latency: Software Baseline vs. Hardware Accelerator
